---
title: "Project"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

df = read.table("bodyfat.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
```

# Data Transformation
```{r}
names(df) <- tolower(names(df))
```

```{r}
# height: inches to cm
df$height_cm = df$height*2.54
# weight: lbs to kg - for interpretability
df$weight_kg = df$weight*0.4536

df = df[,-c(1,4,5)]
```
